chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3681 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 24813/2017 2. For order on Nazir report dated 30.06.2017 3. For hearing of CMA No. 16664/2017 4. For hearing of main case 26.03.2025 Messrs. Sarfraz Ali Metlo, Adeela Ansari, Athar Hussain and Atiya Manzoor, advocates for the petitioner Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General It is jointly stated by the respective learned counsel that grievance of the petitioner has been adjudicated upto the level of learned Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, therefore, this petition appears to have served its purpose and become infructuous. Learned counsel for the petitioner seeks that this petition may be disposed of along with pending application/s. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
